hero.title: <gradient>Run AI-generated apps</gradient> without hassle
hero.description: Openable.dev is the missing link between AI code generation and local development. Import, run, and edit your projects in Cursor. No Node.js, no terminal commands, no configuration.

zero.title: Zero configuration
zero.description: No need to install Node.js, npm, or any development tools.

cursor.title: Cursor friendly
cursor.description: Built with simplicity in mind. If you can use an app, you can run and edit your code.

ai.title: Works with any AI platform
ai.description: Use Lovable, Bolt, v0, or any other AI code generation platform. The projects are imported with GitHub!

features.title:
<gradient>Everything you need</gradient>
nothing you don't
features.description: Openable.dev removes all the complexity of local development while giving you full control.

creators.title: Made for creators, not just developers.
creators.description: Optimized for projects created by tools like Lovable. Go from generated code to a running app in seconds.

github.title: GitHub integration
github.description: Connect your GitHub account and clone, sync, update your repositories easily directly from Openable.

cursor.title: Open in Cursor instantly
cursor.description: Jump straight into editing with Cursor. Perfect for refining AI-generated code.

setup.title: One-click project setup
setup.description: Import a repository and run it instantly. No Node.js installation. No npm commands.

cta.title:
<gradient>Turn AI-generated code</gradient>
into a real app
cta.description:
Stop fighting with development setup.
Run and edit AI-generated applications locally in seconds.

code.question: Do I need to know how to code ?
code.answer: Not at all! Openable.dev is designed for non-technical users. You can import, run, and preview your projects without writing a single line of code.

import.question: How can I import my projects ?
import.answer: It is super simple ! You just need to connect your GitHub account and select all the projects you want to import.

platforms.question: What platforms does Openable.dev support ?
platforms.answer: Openable.dev is available on macOS, with Linux and Windows support coming soon.

builtForMe.question: Is it built for me ?
builtForMe.answer: If you use AI tools like Lovable, Bolt, or v0 to generate code and want to run it locally without dealing with terminal commands, then yes, it is built for you.

free.question: Is it free ?
free.answer: Openable.dev is free to download and use during the beta period. We will announce pricing plans before the beta ends.
